channel.title: Xes on Huzaif
channel.description: Recent content in Xes on Huzaif

item.title: Name is where a dead person lives
item.description: I have two names. They meet and they depart….. / And two languages, I have forgotten in which I used to dream. / I have English for writing / Its vocabulary is obedient, / Yet, I have another language from the dialogue of the Heavens. - Mahmoud Darwaish (to myslef) about the dialogue of the Heavns, it is what helps him exist. It is what holds the emptiness in a man’s heart and Keeps him alive.
